@startuml
title UML Diagram: Class VariableRelationship in Context

' Hints box
note left of "Conceptual::VariableRelationship"
  **Hints**
  - Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.
  - Click on a name to go to the corresponding page.
end note

' Main class: Conceptual::VariableRelationship
class "Conceptual::\nVariableRelationship" as VR {
  identifier : Identifier
  semantics : ControlledVocabularyEntry
}

' Related classes
class "Conceptual::\nConceptualVariable" as CV
class "Conceptual::\nVariableStructure" as VS
class "CollectionsPattern::\nMemberRelationship" as MR

' Relationships
VR --> CV : hasSource
VR --> VS : hasTarget
VS --> VR : has

' Refinement relationship
VR ..> MR : «Refine»

' Footer note
note bottom
  DDI Cross Domain Integration (DDI-CDI) 1.0 – Conceptual::VariableRelationship
end note

@enduml
